page_content:
THET632 Playwriting (3 Credits)

Lessons in playwriting, including character, plot, dramatic structure, dialogue, exposition, setting, and creating theatrical images.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

THET633 Figure Drawing for Theatre Design (3 Credits)

Figure Drawing is designed to give students the necessary drawing skills that are required when drawing and painting for the theatre. We will study anatomy, figure/ground relationships, composition plotting and layout, planar value, light and shadow analysis, color theory and the fundamentals of perspective and how this applies to theatre design. Credit Only Granted for. THET633 or THET669F.
